001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.database;
002
003import androidx.room.Database;
004import androidx.room.RoomDatabase;
005import androidx.room.TypeConverter;
006import androidx.room.TypeConverters;
007import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.BatchDao;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.CandlingObservationDao;
009import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.EggDao;
010import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.EggGroupDao;
011import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.IncubatorDao;
012import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Batch;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.CandlingObservation;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Egg;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Incubator;
017import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithIncubator;
018import java.time.Instant;
019import java.time.LocalDate;
020
021@TypeConverters(PipPipDatabase.Converters.class)
022@Database(
023    entities = {
024        Egg.class,
025        EggGroup.class,
026        Batch.class,
027        Incubator.class,
028        CandlingObservation.class
029    },
030    views = {
031        BatchWithIncubator.class
032    },
033
034    version = PipPipDatabase.VERSION
035)
036public abstract class PipPipDatabase extends RoomDatabase {
037
038  static final String NAME = "pip_pip_hooray_db";
039  static final int VERSION = 3;
040
041  public abstract BatchDao getBatchDao();
042
043  public abstract CandlingObservationDao getCandlingObservationDao();
044
045  public abstract EggDao getEggDao();
046
047  public abstract EggGroupDao getEggGroupDao();
048
049  public abstract IncubatorDao getIncubatorDao();
050
051  public static class Converters {
052
053    @TypeConverter
054    public static Long toLongFromInstant(Instant value) {
055      return (value != null) ? value.toEpochMilli() : null;
056    }
057
058    @TypeConverter
059    public static Instant toInstant(Long value) {
060      return (value != null) ? Instant.ofEpochMilli(value) : null;
061    }
062
063    @TypeConverter
064    public static Long toLong(LocalDate value) {
065      return (value != null) ? value.toEpochDay() : null;
066    }
067
068    @TypeConverter
069    public static LocalDate toLocalDate(Long value) {
070      return (value != null) ? LocalDate.ofEpochDay(value) : null;
071    }
072  }
073
074}
